summary: The diff implements a new history-synchronized navigation hook for opening/closing the Experience view, wires it into MindVaultLandingPage, adds ErrorBoundary diagnostics logging (URL/history.state/intent flag) and makes “Try Again” deterministic via full reload. However, the diff summary also indicates multiple unrelated landing/marketing page visual/content adjustments that were not requested and conflict with the stated non-goals.

hallucinated_features.description: Landing/marketing page visual/content changes unrelated to fixing the intermittent navigation crash (e.g., HeroSection gradient/token changes, reduced orb opacity, explicit black text in CorporateBurnoutInsightSection, other layout/readability tweaks).
hallucinated_features.reason: BuildRequest non-goals say not to redesign marketing/landing content beyond what is necessary to fix navigation reliability; these appear to be broader stylistic/content adjustments not tied to the navigation crash fix.
evidence: frontend-file-summaries.txt (summaries for frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSection.tsx, CorporateBurnoutInsightSection.tsx, and other sections)

hallucinated_features.description: Added smooth scroll-to-top behavior on popstate/open/close transitions.
hallucinated_features.reason: Not requested by any requirement; could be considered extra behavior beyond making navigation/history robust and improving diagnostics.
